events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess field condition: alignment done before final pipe connection (pipe strain - SEQ/TRD). Work is shaft alignment, stage tested/inspected. Reference API 686 and laser manuals. Need compare field condition against standard. API 686 (Recommended Practices for Machinery Installation and Installation Design) likely requires shaft alignment performed after all piping connected and pipe strain checked, because pipe strain affects alignment. Alignment before final pipe connection means pipe strain not accounted for; after connecting pipes, alignment will be off. So non-compliant, installed-defective. Decision fail. Risk high? Pipe strain can cause bearing failure, coupling wear, vibration. High. Work_stage tested/inspected. Percent complete maybe 80? But alignment not valid until after pipe connection; need rework. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Findings: alignment performed prior to final piping connection; no verification of pipe strain; laser alignment readings not representative of operating condition. Actions: disconnect piping, verify no pipe strain, reconnect final piping, recheck alignment hot/cold, document. Rationale. References API 686 (maybe section on alignment after piping/grouting). Need produce JSON with all fields. Ensure valid JSON. Use empty arrays for order/workable? Not asked. sound_source empty? It's string. Could be "". event_time 0, rate 0, value 0. confidence 0.95. percent_complete maybe 70. Let's craft.

events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "tested/inspected",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 70,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Shaft alignment was completed before final piping connection.",
    "Pipe strain from connected piping was not included in the alignment condition.",
    "Laser alignment results do not represent the installed operating state of the asset."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Verify unit is shut down and locked out before reworking alignment.",
    "Complete all final piping connections per OEM/PIP specifications.",
    "Check and relieve pipe strain on the equipment flanges.",
    "Recheck shaft alignment with the laser system after piping is connected and strained.",
    "Document final alignment values and pipe-strain verification."
  ],
  "rationale": "API 686 expects shaft alignment to be verified after all external forces such as piping strain are applied; performing alignment before final pipe connection leaves the machine misaligned in service, leading to vibration, coupling wear, and bearing failure.",
  "references": [
    "API 686 - Machinery Installation and Installation Design",
    "Laser alignment system manufacturer procedures"
  ]
}
